summary_en: Jackie Reyes Yanes is proud to receive the endorsement of the Associated Builders and Contractors of Metro Washington (ABC) — a leading voice for the construction industry, skilled trades, and workforce development across our region.
summary: Jackie Reyes Yanes is proud to receive the endorsement of the Associated Builders and Contractors of Metro Washington (ABC)
summary_es: Jackie Reyes-Yanes se enorgullece de recibir el respaldo de Associated Builders and Contractors of Metro Washington (ABC), una voz líder en la industria de la construcción, los oficios especializados y el desarrollo de la fuerza laboral en nuestra región.
title_en: Jackie Reyes Yanes Earns Endorsement from ABC Metro Washington
title_es: Jackie Reyes-Yanes recibe el respaldo de ABC Metro Washington
title: Jackie Reyes Yanes Earns Endorsement from ABC Metro Washington
